underlying_goal: Run a discuss-phase workflow for Phase 38 (Extensible Sensor Architecture) to produce a CONTEXT.md with implementation decisions
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly used AskUserQuestion tool which auto-dismissed without user input, then initially blamed the tool rather than its own usage, frustrating the user.
brief_summary: User wanted to discuss Phase 38 design decisions and produce a CONTEXT.md; AskUserQuestion tool failures caused significant friction but the deliverable was eventually created after switching to plain conversation.
